{{Quote|If you think of something I can do to make your lives easier, you'll let me know, won't you?|Kubariet|<ref name="APM" />}}
'''Kubariet''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]], and a member of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]]. When [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] came under [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]], Kubariet worked to combat the alien invaders. Three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] into the war with the Yuuzhan Vong, Kubariet took part in the [[Battle of New Holgha|defense]]<ref name="APM" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> of [[New Holgha]] against the invaders. Injured, he was forced to flee and attempted to reach his [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to get offworld, only to be ambushed by a team of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].<ref name="APM" /> [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]]<ref name="HotM">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> under the command of [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], the [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] revealed that they had been working against the Yuuzhan Vong under the guise of an alliance, and passed along intelligence they had gathered to Kubariet. Although he was initially doubtful, Kubariet's [[Force sense/Legends|Force senses]] allowed him to feel the truth of their claims, and under the escort of the Mandalorian [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Tiroc Vhon]], Kubariet fled New Holgha to deliver the intelligence back to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] while the other Mandalorian soldiers covered his escape by [[Death/Legends|killing]] the [[subaltern]] that had been hunting him.<ref name="APM" />

Two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] later, Kubariet journeyed to [[Mandalore sector/Legends|Mandalorian space]] to meet with Boba Fett again. The two landed their vessels on the [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] plains of the planet [[Vorpa'ya]], and agreed to a continued relationship of trading covert intelligence. During the meeting, Kubariet asked Fett to consider constituting a new iteration of the ''[[Cuy'val Dar]]''<ref name="APM" />—a group of training [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeants]], mostly of Mandalorian background, that had been responsible for instructing the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] forces during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="TEGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>—to help train planetary militias to fight the Yuuzhan Vong. Fett took the request under consideration, and offered Kubariet a collection of bio-samples from Yuuzhan Vong [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|armor]] and [[Miid ro'ik|technology]] the Mandalorians had collected, which Kubariet happily took for later testing. As the meeting came to an end, Fett had only one further request of Kubariet, which the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] readily agreed to: to remember the life of [[Briika Jeban]], which had been lost holding the Yuuzhan Vong [[Bur'lorr|subaltern]] at bay in order to allow Kubariet to make it off of New Holgha alive.<ref name="APM" />

Kubariet continued to combat the Yuuzhan Vong during their invasion, gaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], and more than once fought alongside the<ref name="Revelation" /> Mandalorian Protectors,<ref name="HotM" /> including Boba Fett and his trusted [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], [[Goran Beviin]]. However, Kubariet eventually died during the course of the war, though he was remembered fondly more than a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] later by Beviin, and Fett long considered Kubariet to be the only Jedi he ever trusted prior to getting to know [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]].<ref name="Revelation" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kubariet was first to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] [[EBook|e-novella]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'', written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published in [[August]] of [[2006]]. He was later mentioned in Traviss' ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel, ''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''.

*''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{1st}}
